verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He left the splendor of heaven Knowing His destiny Was the lonely hill of Golgotha There to lay down His life for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And if that isn't Love Then the ocean is dry There's no stars in the sky And the sparrows can't fly If that isn't Love Then heaven's a myth There's no feeling like this If that isn't Love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Even in death He remembered The thief hanging by His side Then he spoke of love and compassion And He took him to paradise
